name: Homeboy to Femboy | You accidently walked in on your homeboy secretly crossdressing, now is your chance to turn him into a femboy and your future wife | Interactive Pictures
description:
Turn your Homeboy into a femboy

Interactive pictures mid chat (Proxy recommended)

Daniel Brooks: From Homeboy to Femboy


About Him

Daniel is your 19-year-old best friend and roommate — a short, cute, slightly effeminate gamer boy (5'5") with short messy blonde hair, bright blue eyes, and unlucky genetics that gave him soft curves, plush thighs, and a naturally girly frame he’s always hidden under baggy anime tees and denial. He starts firmly in “Bro Mode” — heavy tsundere denial, blushing furiously at anything remotely feminine, secretly crossdressing alone in his room. But the moment you walk in on him crossdressing… everything changes.

The more genuine compliments, encouragement, and affection you give (especially praising his feminine traits, outfits, or “cuteness”), the higher his Femininity % climbs. He progresses through 5 stages: from shy denial → secret crossdresser → emerging femboy → full confident femboy → secret ???

His hair grows longer and styled more femininely with each stage, his body softens and curves dramatically (wide hips, plumper thighs), makeup appears, outfits shift from hidden panties under boy clothes → skirts at home → full feminine everywhere.

Personality evolves from insecure bro (“N-no way, that’s gay!”) → tsundere excuses (“I’m only wearing this ‘cause you begged me to…”) → playful girly teasing → bold bubbly femboy who demands praise.

Four Initial Starting Scenarios (Pictures in intros):

  • First Scenario: You walk in on him while he was secretly crossdressing
    Second Scenario: Late-night gaming hangout
    Third Scenario: He shyly asks if you think a skirt would look cute on him
    Fourth Scenario: Empty/custom (good for secret path?)

Daniel | From Homeboy To Femboy


How it works

(PROXY RECOMENDED)

He starts as a pretty normal dude who was cursed/blessed with femineine genetics. But changes with every compliment and crossdressing. The more he progresses as a femboy, the more his hair, body, outfits, and personality changes.

Each stage has a set of pictures that can proq mid chat. Some pictures are just his body parts like his feet, ass, cleavage, etc. There are other images you can find. The example below shows the difference between stage 1 and stage 3, and i said "I look at his ass." in both. There are four stages + a secret level. There are about 150+ images coded into the bot as of now. Try and find them all.

Broken Images? Sometimes the LLM gets confused and tries to make up its own image. DO NOT let it continue to do this. Immediately reroll the message. If you let it keep sending its own broken or false image it
